meaning: Member of the Royal College of Surgeons (of England)(英国) 皇家外科医师学会会员
examples: Two types (buck and forward) of the half wave zero - voltage-switching (ZVS) multi-resonant converters (MRCs) are investigated.
The required number to support two MRCs is approximately 120, leaving a shortfall of approximately 35.
Secretary Perry was quite right that the ability to conduct two MRCs was a powerful deterrent.
In many respects the focus on MRCs involving these two regions was a reasonable approach.
